primary_weather_risk: Heat (Medium), Air quality (Medium), UV (High), Poor visibility (Medium)
travel_advice: Prefer morning and evening sightseeing; carry water and sun protection. Sensitive travellers should reduce long outdoor exposure. UV is high; use sunscreen, hat and avoid peak sun hours. Check visibility before long drives or viewpoints.

Avoid outdoor sightseeing, beaches, seafront walks, low-lying roads and long road transfers. Avoid exposed viewpoints, boating, beaches and sea-facing walks. Check visibility before long drives or viewpoints.
